name: TeleBar
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend the TeleBar macOS menu bar app, especially the repo app at `apps/telebar`.
short_description: Run and extend the TeleBar menu bar app.
audience: Mac users who want a compact Telegram control center
Builders maintaining TeleBar setup, keychain storage, inbox visibility, and AI writing flows
Teams keeping bot setup links and chat access honest inside a native popover
detail_lines: Keeps TeleBar work menu-bar-only, with short setup paths, grouped rows, and compact native popover controls.
Treats Telegram bot tokens and OpenAI keys as Keychain-only secrets, never plaintext catalog or defaults data.
Shows only chats the bot can actually access and uses supported Telegram setup links instead of fake autonomous setup.
